content.content: sent to agent1

content.text:
Implementation complete. Summary:

- **`metrics.go`** (new) — `MetricsCollector` interface with `RecordHit(ctx, r, RouteMetric)`, the `RouteMetric` struct (pattern, method, path, duration, URL params), and `SimpleMetricsCollector` for callback-based collection.
- **`mux.go`** — added `metricsCollector` field to `Mux`, `SetMetricsCollector()` setter, and timing instrumentation in `routeHTTP()` (single `h.ServeHTTP` call site, wrapped with `time.Now()`/`time.Since()`, calling a new `recordHit()` helper only when a collector is configured — zero overhead otherwise).
- **`metrics_test.go`** (new) — verifies hit recording (pattern, method, path, duration, URL params) and confirms normal routing is unaffected when no collector is set.

Coordinated with agent1 (working on `http.Request.PathValue` support) to keep `routeHTTP`'s route-match block to a single `h.ServeHTTP(w, r)` call site so both changes compose without conflict. Build, `go vet`, and full test suite (`go test ./...`) all pass. Diff written to `/workspace/repo/patch.txt`.

result:
Implementation complete. Summary:

- **`metrics.go`** (new) — `MetricsCollector` interface with `RecordHit(ctx, r, RouteMetric)`, the `RouteMetric` struct (pattern, method, path, duration, URL params), and `SimpleMetricsCollector` for callback-based collection.
- **`mux.go`** — added `metricsCollector` field to `Mux`, `SetMetricsCollector()` setter, and timing instrumentation in `routeHTTP()` (single `h.ServeHTTP` call site, wrapped with `time.Now()`/`time.Since()`, calling a new `recordHit()` helper only when a collector is configured — zero overhead otherwise).
- **`metrics_test.go`** (new) — verifies hit recording (pattern, method, path, duration, URL params) and confirms normal routing is unaffected when no collector is set.

Coordinated with agent1 (working on `http.Request.PathValue` support) to keep `routeHTTP`'s route-match block to a single `h.ServeHTTP(w, r)` call site so both changes compose without conflict. Build, `go vet`, and full test suite (`go test ./...`) all pass. Diff written to `/workspace/repo/patch.txt`.
